Etymology (Clark = Clerk) is in Section 1 of business case but not white paper or articles. Author must be named (see Critical #5).

EPTAC could replicate bench-level training in Hamilton directly. Mitigation: move first, establish presence. Clark's moat is four-pillar integration — EPTAC won't open assembly shop or run M&A advisory.

IPC certification is partnership, not proprietary. If EPTAC/IPC terminates, Pillar 1 certified-training collapses. Mitigation: grow Clark Courses (proprietary, no IPC dependency) as share of training revenue.
Train-the-trainer risks quality decay. Mitigation: Clarkware evidence discipline makes quality degradation visible in data before it shows in outcomes.
At 5-10 centers Clark revenue is $300K-$640K — viable small business, not venture return. May be a self-funded services company with software layer. Not a failure.
